title: thelypteris degeneri
intro: Thelypteris degeneri, also known as the Hawaiian maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris degeneri include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the fern is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
